[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Perrn''' was an officer in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].

He dressed in the ground assault armor favored by [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] commanders. He looked like a formidable Imperial officer; however, while he was a good officer, he had no desire to die needlessly for the Imperial cause. He was known to talk his way out of the worst situations only to reappear later to win the day for the Empire.

He was stationed on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and was in command of a [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] patrol. While his group was on its way to the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]], it came across a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] roughly four kilometers from the generator.

The Rebels wiped out his entire group, two [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout troopers]] on their speeder bikes and Perrn, along with four assault troopers and a driver in a [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]], but Perrn himself escaped by informing the group about the [[HAV/r C10 Siege Tower|siege tower]] making its way to the shield generator.
